subject: feat(icon): redesign app icon as geometric path-based B monogram
body:
Replace font-dependent <text> element with hand-tuned SVG paths.
The B is built from two D-shaped cubic bezier bowls (lower slightly
wider) with even-odd counter cutouts. Eliminates cross-platform font
rendering inconsistencies — identical output on macOS, Ubuntu CI, etc.

Regenerated all PNG assets via sharp (512, 192, 180, 32px).

Tags: icons, svg, pwa, branding
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: branding
Semver: patch
